rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF TAVITA E AVEGALIO
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1. Regarding Affidavit Re Real Property of Small Value for Jane Alapati: a. A Donnell Evans has signed as attorney-in-fact for Annette Alapati; however, the power of attorney allows a person to act on behalf of another individual, not make representations on behalf of another person. 2. Regarding Affidavit Re Real Property of Small Value for Jean Arnold: a. Christopher Avegalio, who is deceased, is the successor of Tavita Avegalio, but it was Christopher Avegalio's successors who signed the Affidavit. No authority has been provided to show that Christopher Avegalio's successors are able to execute the affidavit. See Probate Code 13006 for definition of "successor of the decedent", who is authorized to execute the affidavit. Remote appearances may be made. Please review Local Rule 14.1. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 160 225 4765 Password: 514879 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF EDWARD BLAIR FLORENCE
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1. Petitioner has paid attorney's fees totaling $64,348, for which he is requesting reimbursement for (along with up to an additional $1,980 for anticipated attorney fees) for the will contest litigation and probate administration. These fees are being requested in lieu of statutory compensation and extraordinary compensation under Common Fund Doctrine Theory. Petitioner is also requesting $5,259.17 for costs related to will contest. 2. Petitioner is requesting $6,116.12 for financial assistance he provided to Decedent while he was still alive. No creditor's claim was ever filed. Remote appearances may be made. Please review Local Rule 14.1. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 160 225 4765 Password: 514879 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above.

rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF GLORIA ABURTO
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Executed Copy Of New Trust And Will
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Conservator should report whether she has executed the conservatee's Trust and Will. If so, copies of said documents need to be filed. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF PATRICIA WILLIAMS-SWINT
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Limited Appointment Under IAEA
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 05/20/2025. Issues necessitating a continuance: 1) No Notice of Petition to Administer Estate (Form DE-121) has been filed (Probate Code Section 8100). 2) All notices must include language about remote appearances (San Francisco Local Rule 14.1.C.6). 3) Item 3g(4) is not checked, although the proposed personal representative does appear to be a successor personal representative. 4) No proposed order has been received or lodged with the court (San Francisco Local Rule 14.7.A). Form DE-140 is the required form for this order. Please address the above issues and deliver courtesy copies of all further filings to this examiner no later than 05/06/2025 to avoid further continuance.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF EDISON KWOCK FAI TSENG
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 5/28/2025 (the earliest available date). The following issues must be cleared two weeks prior to the date: (1) Petition #8 must include Pui Ching Middle School, who is the residual beneficiary, and the school must be properly noticed, too. (2) Attorney's declaration filed 4/8/2025 setting forth that petitioners were friends and caregivers of the decedent. Petitioner(s)'s verified declaration explaining further their relationship to the decedent further in relation to Prob. Code 21380 seems necessary. (3) Any supplement needs to be served to all persons who are entitled to the service. Email service to meet Prob. Code sec. 1215(c). Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.
